channel.title: Cboe Options Technical Updates
channel.description: Technical specification updates from Cboe Options

item.title: Cboe Options Exchange: C2 System Specification Update v3.14
item.description: C2 will update the multicast top-of-book feed to add a new message type for complex order book changes effective 2026-07-01. Member firms should update parsers accordingly.

item.title: Cboe BZX Options: Connectivity Window Scheduled for 2026-07-15
item.description: Cboe BZX Options will host a connectivity test window on July 15, 2026 from 8:00am to 11:00am ET. Firms connecting via FIX should test session negotiation.
